title: Snow Default
description: Make the world turn to Winter
body:
# Snow Default

Transform your Minecraft world into a winter wonderland with the **Snow Default** shader! This unique shader pack enhances your game with stunning visual effects, delivering a captivating snowy aesthetic while preserving the classic Minecraft experience. 

**Used BSL Shaders**

## 

![Snow Default Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e71261e76d19afa069d807ad6e29cb7c9e20905_0.webp)

## 

## Key Features

- **Seasonal Transformation**: Instantly turns your Minecraft world into a winter landscape, complete with shimmering snow and frosty textures.
- **Visual Enhancements**: 
  - **Motion Blur**: Adds a smooth, cinematic feel to your movements.
  - **Custom Clouds**: Experience dynamic clouds that enhance the overall atmosphere.
  - **Depth of Field**: Bring focus to your scenes, creating a more immersive experience.

## Compatibility

- Fully compatible with both **Iris**, ensuring that you can easily integrate it into your existing setups.
- **Optifine** is comming soon..

## Usage Guidelines

### You Can…
- Use this shader pack for breathtaking screenshots and captivating videos that showcase your builds.
- Modify it for personal use to tailor the experience to your liking.
- Publish your heavily modified version* to share your creativity with others.
- Include it in modpacks or servers, giving your community a taste of the winter vibe.

### You Cannot…
- Share the shader pack without my permission. Respecting creators' rights is essential for a healthy modding community.

## Important Notes

Please keep in mind that this shader is currently in **Alpha**. As such, you may encounter some bugs or unexpected behavior. Your feedback is invaluable as we work toward refining and enhancing the shader.

If you want to contact
Contact to: marctgamer@gmail.com

![Snow Default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc7df5e9e066b991d00a32895597074792d78188.jpeg)

Embrace the winter season in Minecraft and immerse yourself in a snowy paradise with **Snow Default**!
